claims.proposition: The collection at $.culture_manager.cultures contains culture records.

reasons: The structural path names culture_manager.cultures and the CK3 Wiki has a Culture topic.

claims.proposition: Map keys under $.culture_manager.cultures are identifiers for culture records.

reasons: The key domain and collection path both name cultures.

claims.proposition: The collection at $.characters.dead_prunable contains records for dead prunable characters.

reasons: The path is explicit, but the exact pruning semantics need documentation or installed-definition support.

claims.proposition: The collection at $.dead_unprunable contains records for dead unprunable characters.

reasons: The path is explicit, but the exact unprunable semantics need documentation or installed-definition support.

claims.proposition: The collection at $.religion.faiths contains faith records.

sectionAnchors: Faiths at the start of the game

reasons: The structural path names religion.faiths and the CK3 Wiki has a Faith topic.

claims.proposition: Map keys under $.religion.faiths are identifiers for faith records.

sectionAnchors: Faiths at the start of the game

reasons: The key domain and collection path both name faiths.

claims.proposition: The collection at $.landed_titles.landed_titles contains landed title records.

reasons: The structural path names landed_titles.landed_titles and the CK3 Wiki has a Titles topic.

claims.proposition: The collection at $.living contains records for living characters.

reasons: The path name and record volume strongly suggest character records, but this initial rule does not yet inspect installed game definitions.

notes: Do not create one durable node per character.

claims.proposition: Map keys under $.living are identifiers for living character records.

reasons: The key domain is structurally clear, but semantic ID type needs more cross-source validation.
